# tf_publish_oci

*This page will be auto-generated by stardoc.*

Push modules to OCI registries.

```starlark
load("@rules_tf2//tf2:def.bzl", "tf_publish_oci")

tf_publish_oci(
    name = "push_oci",
    module = ":my_module",
    stack_name = "my-module",
)
```

See [Publishing Overview](README.md) for more information.
